completion_summary: Corrected safe BO to learn experiment-peak public risk, removed categorical scalar leakage with recipe space 0.2, added conservative uncertainty-aware decisions, completed 240 Dev runs and independent replay audit, and selected the fixed policy for a future untouched freeze without making a benchmark claim.
scope: Repair safe BO to learn experiment-peak public risk rather than terminal-assay risk, add conservative public initial designs and uncertainty-aware feasibility, retain decision diagnostics, and evaluate only on train/dev seeds before any new bench freeze
